/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pos_tests.dir/placeholder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pos_tests.dir/test_main.cpp.o -o pos_tests  ../libpos_lib.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd ../lib/libgtest.a
